features.title: Real-time Translation
features.desc: The moment you speak, it's delivered in the other person's language for seamless conversation.

features.title: 40+ Languages
features.desc: Support for major world languages in one app, enabling truly global communication.

features.title: AI Voice Synthesis
features.desc: Generates translated speech while preserving your voice tone and intonation.

features.title: Security
features.desc: End-to-end encryption keeps all your conversations completely safe.

steps.title: Voice Input
steps.desc: Speak naturally in your language. AI captures your voice in real time.

steps.title: AI Analysis & Translation
steps.desc: Our advanced engine understands context and delivers the optimal translation.

steps.title: Instant Output
steps.desc: The translated sentence flows out vividly in the other person's language.

free.headline: TalkSync is completely free
free.desc:
From account creation to real-time translation, no payment required.
We operate through advertising so all features remain free.

items.title: Unlimited Use
items.desc: Use real-time translation anytime without time limits.

items.title: No Card Required
items.desc: Get started with just your email — no credit card or payment info needed.

items.title: All Features Included
items.desc: Equal access to all languages and features, no premium tiers.

trust.headline: Your data. We don't know it.
trust.subDesc: TalkSync treats privacy as a core principle from the ground up. No user data is ever recorded on our servers.

cards.title: Perfect Key Isolation
cards.desc: Your API key is stored only in your device's local storage. It is architecturally impossible for it to be sent to or collected by TalkSync servers.

cards.title: Enterprise-grade App Security
cards.desc: ASAR archive packing and full source code obfuscation prevent external tampering. The deployed binary contains no original source.

cards.title: Transparent Data Handling
cards.desc: Captured audio data is discarded from memory immediately after translation. No voice recording, unauthorized collection, or third-party forwarding.

trust.bannerSlogan: The server cannot know what you said.
